response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:22: Identified as a static screen with promotional text, including the song debut announcement. 2. 03:22: Detected the start of the performance of 'Glitter Love' by Omaru Polka. 3. Searched for 'Glitter Love Omaru Polka' to find lyrics, but since it is a new song debut, no lyrics could be found. Therefore, lyrics are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a static promotional screen for Omaru Polka's 2026 birthday celebration, which announces the debut of her new song, 'Glitter Love'. The second part of the video features the live performance of this new song.

scenes.description: A static promotional screen for Omaru Polka's 2026 birthday celebration. On-screen text includes '新曲のお披露目あり!' and the song title 'Glitter Love'. No vocal music is playing.
The live performance of the new song 'Glitter Love' begins. Omaru Polka performs on stage with a digital audience holding glow sticks.
